channel.title: CeruleanOak — From the workshop
channel.description: Devlog posts from CeruleanOak — one developer, small games.

item.title: Rewriting the dice combat loop
item.description: Turns out 7-sided dice break more brains than I expected. Notes on what stuck and what didn't. [Dice Wars]

item.title: Hanafuda rule-editor notes
item.description: Every household plays koi-koi slightly wrong — and that's the feature, not the bug. [Hanafuda]

item.title: ASCII pathfinding that feels fair
item.description: A* is correct. It also makes enemies feel psychic. Here's what I did instead. [Pure Rogue]
